DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS -- JESSICA R. STAVNEZER APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY. STEVEN S. MIYAKE APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION BY 1:00 P.M. ON DECEMBER 13, 2004. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $436.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
ORDER ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-15-2004 IN 206, DEFENDANT ALBERT TAPLIN'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GRAMTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/7/05 IS CONTINUED TO 3/21/05 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY ACCORDING TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE, HOWEVER THE FILING OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION IS ACCORDING TO 2/7/05 TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERKS: V. MU/D.
